author: codex

subagent_lane.result: Read-only scout recommended exact raw unit literal customers -> count, with ridership promotion only when metric payload proves ridership context.

changes.summary: Added exact customers count alias while allowing ridership-context payloads to override customers to riders; widened ridership evidence boundary to handle normalized field joins and event/daily ridership names.
Added exact low-count residual unit aliases for count, workforce, engagement, duration, money-rate, volume, mass, physical, safety-rate, count-rate, rate, ratio, and ridership literals.
Added focused coverage for customers as count, customers as ridership under event/daily ridership evidence, and representative exact residual unit aliases.

remaining: Metric other residual is now 227. Remaining top units include intentionally ambiguous scale literals, generic year/rate/units, several rates requiring more policy, and singleton physical/count tails.
The filesystem remains extremely tight at roughly 4 MB free on /mnt/models after rebuilding data/canonical.db; future materialization may need the same temporary DB move or broader disk cleanup.
